register.welcomeDescription: Build a smarter warehouse with intelligent stock tracking, automated replenishment, and seamless inventory operations.
register.lightningFastDesc: Instant access to your inventory data with real-time updates.
register.smartAnalyticsDesc: Make data-driven decisions with comprehensive insights and reports.
register.trustedPlatformDesc: Join a proven system trusted by businesses worldwide.
register.enterpriseSecurityDesc: Your data is protected with industry-leading security standards.
register.signUpToStart: Sign up to get started with your inventory dashboard
register.name: Name
register.redirectingToLogin: Welcome, {name}! Your account has been created. Redirecting to login page...

demo.useDropdownToSignIn: Use the dropdown on the right to sign in as Admin, Client, or Supplier. All demo accounts use password: 12345678.
demo.adminDescription: Full access: products, orders, invoices, warehouses, admin panel. New user registration creates an admin account.
demo.clientDescription: Client portal: catalog, your orders, invoices, place order, pay with Stripe. Role set via script for showcase only.
demo.supplierDescription: Supplier portal: your products, orders, revenue, low stock. Role and supplier link set via script for showcase only.
demo.accountsAndRolesDescription: You cannot create client or supplier accounts at sign-up; those roles are applied in the DB via script for demo. As admin, use User Management to view or change user roles.

products.inventorySectionDescription: Efficiently manage your product catalog with advanced filtering, search capabilities, and real-time stock tracking. Monitor inventory levels, organize by categories and suppliers, and maintain optimal stock control.
products.myProductsDescription: Products supplied by you. View stock, categories, and which store owner manages each product. Use filters and search to find items quickly.
products.enterProductDetails: Enter the details of the product below
products.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this product?
products.noDataToExport: There are no products to export with the current filters.
products.exportFailed: Failed to export products. Please try again.

orders.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this order?

invoices.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this invoice?

categories.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this category?
categories.listPageDescription: Organize your inventory with a comprehensive category system. Create, manage, and maintain product categories to streamline your inventory organization and improve product discoverability.
categories.noDataToExport: There are no categories to export with the current filters.
categories.exportFailed: Failed to export categories. Please try again.

suppliers.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this supplier?
suppliers.listPageDescription: Manage your supplier relationships efficiently. Track supplier information, status, and maintain detailed records for better inventory management and procurement planning.
suppliers.noDataToExport: There are no suppliers to export with the current filters.
suppliers.exportFailed: Failed to export suppliers. Please try again.

orders.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this order?
orders.storeOrdersDesc: Orders placed by you and by clients. Filter by order type, status, and payment.
orders.clientOrdersDesc: Orders placed by clients that include your products. View details, update status, and manage shipping.
orders.yourOrdersDesc: View and track all your orders here. Check status, payment, and shippingâopen an order for full details.
orders.supplierOrdersDesc: Orders that contain your products. Track status, payments, and invoices created by the product owner.
orders.defaultOrdersDesc: Manage client orders, track order status, monitor payments, and handle shipping. View order history, update statuses, and process cancellations.
orders.noDataToExport: There are no orders to export with the current filters.
orders.exportFailed: Failed to export orders. Please try again.

invoices.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this invoice?
invoices.yourInvoicesDesc: Your invoices, payment status, and order history. View details and track what you owe or have paid.
invoices.storeInvoicesDesc: Invoices for your orders and for client orders. Filter by invoice type, status, and search.
invoices.clientInvoicesDesc: Invoices for orders placed by clients that include your products. View details, send, and track payment.
invoices.invoiceManagementDesc: Manage invoices, track payment status, monitor due dates, and handle billing. View invoice history, update statuses, and send invoices to clients.
invoices.warehouseManagementDesc: Manage warehouse locations. Add, edit, and track warehouses for multi-location inventory. Stock allocation and inter-warehouse transfers are not yet implementedâyou can create and edit warehouses now; assigning stock to locations and moving stock between warehouses will be available in a future update.
invoices.noDataToExport: There are no invoices to export with the current filters.
invoices.exportFailed: Failed to export invoices. Please try again.

warehouses.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this warehouse?
warehouses.noDataToExport: There are no warehouses to export with the current filters.
warehouses.exportFailed: Failed to export warehouses. Please try again.

warehouses.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this warehouse?

home.storeOverviewIntro: The cards below show your store-wide metrics as the store owner, including your own activity and activity from clients and others. Numbers update automatically when you or others make changes.
home.storeOverviewVisitPrefix: For your personal orders, products, and activity only, visit

support.subject: Subject
support.supportTicketsAdminDescription: Manage customer support tickets. Create, view, update status and priority, and add internal notes.
support.storeReviewsAdminDescription: Manage and moderate product reviews. Approve or reject, view by product, rating, and status. Add reviews for products.
support.importHistoryDescription: Bulk import runs (CSV/Excel). Data appears here when you use Import for products, orders, suppliers, or categories. View details, success/failed rows, and error logs.
support.createTicketDescriptionWithOwner: Open a new support ticket. Add a subject, description, and choose who to send it to (product owner).
support.createTicketDescription: Open a new support ticket. Add a subject and description.
support.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the issue or request in detail...

admin.userManagementDescription: Manage users and roles. View and update name, role, and profile.
admin.addNewUserDescription: Add a new user to the system with their details and role.

adminDashboard.searchByOrderOrCustomer: Search by order ID or customer...

activityLog.title: Activity Logs
activityLog.description: Your actions & activities (create, update, delete). Last {period}.

analytics.storeAnalyticsDescription: Overview, statistics, trends, and AI-powered insights across products, users, suppliers, categories, orders, invoices, warehouses, tickets, and reviews. Store-wide metrics.
analytics.last12MonthsRevenue: Last 12 months. Revenue = order totals (excl. cancelled).
analytics.revenueSumOrderLines: Store-wide. Revenue = sum of order line subtotals.
analytics.generateRecommendations: Generate recommendations based on overview, growth, and activity.
analytics.aiInsightsRequireOpenrouter: AI insights require OPENROUTER_API_KEY. Set it in .env to enable.
analytics.clickGenerateInsights: Click "Generate insights" to get AI recommendations from your dashboard data.

insights.pageDescription: Analyze your product inventory performance and get insights to improve your business as product owner.
insights.noLowStockAlerts: No low stock alerts at the moment!
insights.configureOpenrouterKey: Configure OPENROUTER_API_KEY in .env to enable AI-powered recommendations.
insights.getShortAIRecommendations: Get short AI recommendations based on your current metrics.
insights.noAnalyticsDataToExport: There is no analytics data to export.
insights.analyticsDataExportedToCSV: Analytics data exported to CSV file.
insights.failedToExportAnalyticsToCSV: Failed to export analytics data to CSV. Please try again.
insights.analyticsDataExportedToExcel: Analytics data exported to Excel file.
insights.failedToExportAnalyticsToExcel: Failed to export analytics data to Excel. Please try again.
insights.setOpenrouterApiKey: Set OPENROUTER_API_KEY in .env to enable AI-powered insights.

client.clientPortalDescription: Your personalized dashboard for managing orders, invoices, and browsing the product catalog.
client.selectProductToOrder: Select a product to place an order
client.browseAndShop: Browse and shop from the product catalog. Click any product to view details, or use the floating button to place an order.
client.yourSpendingLast6Months: Your spending over the last 6 months (grouped by month)

supplier_portal.supplierPortalDescription: Your supplier dashboard for managing products, viewing orders, and tracking inventory.
supplier_portal.noLowStock: No low stock alerts. All products are well stocked.
supplier_portal.supplierOrdersDescription: View and manage orders for your products. Track order status and shipping information.
supplier_portal.productsSuppliedDescription: Products you supply. View stock levels, categories, and manage your product catalog.
supplier_portal.revenueOverviewDescription: Overview of your revenue from product sales and invoices.
supplier_portal.failedToLoadSupplierDashboard: Failed to load supplier dashboard. Please ensure your account is linked to a supplier entity.
supplier_portal.revenueFromYourProductsLast6Months: Revenue from your products over the last 6 months (grouped by month)
supplier_portal.productsWith20OrFewerUnits: Products with 20 or fewer available units (same threshold as product owner)

reviews.addReviewDescription: Add a review for a product. Select product, rating (1â5), and comment.
reviews.writeReviewPlaceholder: Write your review about the product...

emailPreferencesPage.title: Email Preferences
emailPreferencesPage.description: Manage your email notification preferences. Choose which types of emails you want to receive.
emailPreferencesPage.toggleEmailNotifications: Toggle email notifications on or off. Changes are saved automatically.
emailPreferencesPage.helpTooltipContent: Toggle each type of email on or off. Changes are saved automatically.
emailPreferencesPage.lowStockAlertsDescription: Get notified when product stock falls below threshold
emailPreferencesPage.stockOutNotificationsDescription: Receive alerts when products are completely out of stock
emailPreferencesPage.inventoryReportsDescription: Daily, weekly, or monthly inventory summary reports
emailPreferencesPage.productExpirationWarningsDescription: Alerts for products approaching expiration dates
emailPreferencesPage.orderConfirmationsDescription: Email confirmations when orders are placed
emailPreferencesPage.invoiceEmailsDescription: Receive invoices and payment reminders via email
emailPreferencesPage.shippingNotificationsDescription: Get tracking information when orders are shipped
emailPreferencesPage.preferencesSavedAutomatically: All preferences are saved automatically when you toggle them.
emailPreferencesPage.canChangeSettingsLater: You can always change these settings later.
emailPreferencesPage.criticalAlertsStillSent: Critical system alerts may still be sent regardless of preferences.

apiStatusPage.title: API & Project Status
apiStatusPage.description: Real-time monitoring of Stockly's API endpoints and system health
apiStatusPage.overallHealthDescription: Overall health status of all API endpoints
apiStatusPage.endpointHealthDescription: Individual endpoint health and response times
apiStatusPage.externalServicesDescription: Health status of external APIs and services
apiStatusPage.performanceMetricsDescription: API endpoint performance statistics and trends
apiStatusPage.performanceMetricsWillAppear: Performance metrics will appear as API endpoints are used.
apiStatusPage.systemMetricsDescription: Cache statistics, database performance, and system resources
apiStatusPage.failedToLoadSystemStatus: Failed to load system status. Please try again.

apiDocsPage.title: Stock API Documentation
apiDocsPage.description: Comprehensive API documentation for the Stock inventory management system. All endpoints require authentication via JWT token.
apiDocsPage.errorCodesDescription: Common HTTP status codes and their meanings
apiDocsPage.commonDataStructures: Common data structures used throughout the API

payments.noCardEntryNote: No card entry here â you'll enter payment details on Stripe's page after clicking below.
payments.redirectedToStripeNote: You'll be redirected to Stripe's secure checkout page
